response: The production web server prod-web-01, hosted in the us-east-1 cloud region, has logged 45 straight days of uninterrupted uptime, and currently consumes 78% of its available CPU, 12.4 of its 16 GB total memory, and 234 of its 500 GB total disk capacity. Right now, the server supports 127 active connections, delivers a P99 latency of 145ms, and encounters an average of just 3 errors per hour, reflecting stable, reliable overall performance.
